semantic.role: CI workflow definition for the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Defines continuous integration jobs for code verification across multiple Node.js versions
Contains a release gate job for quality assurance
Includes a package smoke check job to verify npm publish readiness

English.purpose: This document defines the continuous integration pipeline for the ArchSpine project. It automates code verification, release readiness checks, documentation building, and packaging validation in response to pushes to main/master branches and pull requests.
English.context_and_audience: ArchSpine developers and repository maintainers who need to understand the automated CI checks and guarantees. The workflow runs on every push and PR, ensuring that changes meet project quality standards before merge.
key_takeaways: Executes a release gate that performs deeper validation before a release
Builds documentation to ensure no broken references
Smoke-tests the npm package to catch packaging issues early

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了 ArchSpine 项目的持续集成流水线。它自动执行代码验证、发布就绪检查、文档构建以及打包验证，这些操作针对主分支、master 分支的推送以及拉取请求触发。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向 ArchSpine 的开发者与仓库维护者，帮助其了解自动化的 CI 检查与保障措施。该工作流在每次推送和 PR 时运行，确保变更在合并前满足项目质量标准。
key_takeaways: 在 Node.js 20 和 22 上验证代码
执行发布门控，在发布前进行更深度的验证
构建文档以确保没有损坏的引用
对 npm 包进行冒烟测试，尽早发现打包问题
